title: L-Man's Holidays
description: Adding many Christmas (And other holiday) themed mobs and items to the game!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b5373f3f1b00aa054cbcc234f54508a58f41a0f.png)

## This mod add's many Christmas / holiday themed things to minecraft!

**This is still Early release, Excpect updates.**

> **Stockings**
> - Come's in all 16 wool colors, has 9 slots of inventory


> **Mistle Toe**
> - Flower like item that can be placed on walls


> **Wreath**
> - A Leaf ring that can be placed anywhere


> **Presents**
> - a small box that has 2 item slots, placing behavior works like candles, more presents, more item slots.


> **Ornaments**
> - Colorful glass balls, placement behavior works like candles as well. can be placed on walls, floors and used to decorate the christmas tree.


> **Christmas Tree**
> - 3 block tall tree that can be decorated or not, has room for presents underneth.

> **Tree Topper**
> - There are 2 toppers. a small golden star, and a large nether star.

> **Gingerbread**
> - Hard cookie that can be crafted into a house. this house has 3 item slots to store any of your very own gingerbread men. just place a gingerbread in a stonecutter and make a man, woman, villager, and creeper cookie.

> **Candy cane**
> - A new plant spawns in the snowy biomes, a peppermint cane. when broke, a candy cane it dropped

> **Eggnog & Hot Choclate**
> - 2 new drinks

> **Figgy Pudding**
> - New kind of food

> **Fruit Cake**
> - New kind of food

> **Yule log**
> - New kind of food you can place down

> **String lights**
> - Colorful lights able to be hung up on any walls and emits a light

> **Snowglobes**
> - 3 new snowglobes themed around each dimension. you can shake it up by right clicking

> **Nutcrackers**
> - Red and blue nutcrackers that chop when you click them

> **Sleigh bell**
> - A small silver bell that jingles when you click while holding it

> **Icicles**
> - New type of pointed drip that spawns under ice when its placed. once broked, a Icicle shard has a chance of dropping. it's very strong but only has about one hit before it breaks.

> **Reindeer**
> - Spawns in snowy biomes, rarely will have a red noes. Feeding them candy canes will make them fly, feeding them carrots will make them stop.

> **Menorah**
> - Blue multibranched candelabra, Does emmit light.

> **Elf**
> - Small Green guys that spawn in snowy biomes. very fast

> **SANTA CLAUS**
> - You can feed an Elf a cookie, similar to Reindeer. Doing this gives a chance of spawning in santa claus.
